question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 5.00% on 2026-03-10 for the Metaculus question "Before May 1, 2026, will the United States offer to purchase Greenland from Denmark?"?
summary: This is a meta-prediction about whether the Metaculus CP for the Greenland purchase question will rise above 5% by March 10. The CP is currently at 4% (below threshold) after a relentless 6-week downtrend from 70% with zero reversals. The meta-question is essentially closed (no new forecasters can enter), so only existing 152 forecasters can update. No formal sovereignty purchase offer has been made — the Davos "framework" was about military access, not sovereignty. Denmark firmly refuses to sell. No catalyst is visible for a reversal. The only pathway to YES is a surprise formal offer by the Trump administration in the next 8 days, which has no visible precursors. Probability: 3%.

factors.description: CP is at 4%, below the 5.00% threshold. Must rise above 5.00% (not equal) for YES.
Relentless 6-week downtrend with zero reversals: 70% → 25% → 10% → 4%. Structural decline, not noise.
Question closes Mar 2 03:05 UTC (essentially now). No new forecasters can enter. Only existing 152 forecasters can update over the next 8 days.
No formal sovereignty purchase offer has been made. The Davos framework was about military access (1951 agreement update). No visible catalyst for a formal offer.
Denmark/Greenland firmly refuse to sell; topic faded from news since late January. Forecasters have good reason to continue declining CP.
Small absolute gap (1pp) - but in a closed question with 152 established forecasters and no catalyst, this provides minimal upside

reasoning:
**Forecast: 3% (NO)**

Key reasoning:
- **CP is at 4%**, already below the 5% threshold, and must *rise* for YES resolution
- **Relentless 6-week downtrend** from 70% → 4% with zero reversals — structural, not noise
- **Question essentially closed** to new forecasters — only existing 152 can update
- **No catalyst visible** — no formal sovereignty purchase offer made; the Davos "framework" was about military access, not sovereignty transfer
- **Denmark firmly refuses** to sell; Greenland topic has faded from headlines since late January

The only pathway to YES is a surprise Trump administration action (formal purchase offer) in the next 8 days that causes enough existing forecasters to revise upward. No precursors for this are visible.
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) Before May 1, 2026, will the United States offer to purchase Greenland from Denmark?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/41514)
